subcodes.title: Words to a young believer, spoken on 1914-03-12
subcodes.first_line: A wise young man ever thinks of and studies those means which are conducive to his progress - mental, intellectual and spiritual. He lets all amusements and recreations go and applies himself
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @education of children; moral education, @high station of learning, @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession
